benefits.description: Improved cognitive function, ability to function without amphetamines, improved train of thought
GERD resolved, stomach restored to normal
Chronic pain resolved, restless leg syndrome resolved
Felt great, almost 70% back to normal
Able to reduce psychiatric medication by half without negative effects, improved heart issues

side_effects.description: Went into psychosis at end of experiment when taking 70-80mg adderall standard dose (noted as marker of brain healing, resolved next day)

protocol_notes: BPC-157 taken orally in arginate salt form with 200mg circuprime included. User discontinued adderall use during first month of BPC cycling. Later experimented with 70-80mg adderall after completing 4-week cycle (resulted in psychosis which user interpreted as sign of brain recovery). Subsequently reduced to 40mg adderall IR as needed. Also cycling Selank and Semax for 2 weeks while lowering psychiatric medication. Planning future nasal passage administration of BPC-157. User mentions being larger in stature. Had been on adderall for many years prior (tolerance built to 200mg/day).
